remaining_findings.reason: Hydration, route-reset, or browser-storage synchronization requires a component lifecycle redesign and focused UI regression coverage.

initial_build_environment_failure: Google Fonts were unreachable in the restricted sandbox.

schema_cache_logs.evidence: The L compatibility baseline intentionally does not create the product contests table; fail-closed reads may warn during build-time collection.
schema_cache_logs.action: Reconcile the production schema fingerprint and committed migration history before any production rollout. Do not create an unrelated L table to silence the warning.
